name: sitting room
hints: A sitting room with ashes, a basket, and a fireplace. Examine everything!
LOO ASH to search the ashes. LOO BAS to look inside the basket. There's a cobra inside!
PLA FLU (play flute) to charm the cobra out of the basket. It presses a brick and reveals a passage.
PLA FLU charms the cobra which opens a secret passage behind the fireplace. GO PAS to enter. LOO ASH finds hidden items. N=entrance (6).

effects: Message: Cobra crawls out, presses a loose brick and then disappears intoa passage which appeared.

needs: Passageway behind fireplace (must be in room)

notes: Sitting room with cobra in basket, ashes with hidden items, and fireplace with secret passage. PLA FLU charms cobra to open passage. N=entrance (6).
